description: Fetch the closed-state SARS-CoV-2 spike glycoprotein (PDB: 6VXX) from the RCSB. Create a visualization showing the main protein chains as a surface representation and all N-acetyl-D-glucosamine (NAG) glycans as spheres. Save this high-resolution rendering to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/glycan_shield.png. Then, determine the exact number of unique NAG residues in the complex. Write a text report to ~/PyMOL_Data/glycan_report.txt that includes: 1) The total number of unique NAG residues in the entire 6VXX structure, 2) The number of unique NAG residues on Chain A, and 3) The number of unique NAG residues on Chain B.
